title: Latvia's Baiba Braže attending Rubio-called conference in Washington, D.C.
summary_full: Latvian Foreign Minister Baiba Braže is in Washington, D.C. on July 15th and 16th "to attend a conference of foreign ministers hosted by US Secretary of State Marco Rubio," according to a brief release by the Latvian Ministry of Foreign Affairs.
